title: Using API to set Timeline Value as Milestone
excerpt:
How do I use the API to set a timeline column type value as a milestone? 
I can set the the from and to with the API but there is no milestone option. If I manually mark a timeline value as a milestone through the websit…

posts.author: cotani (Chris)
posts.cookedHtml:
How do I use the API to set a timeline column type value as a milestone?

I can set the the from and to with the API but there is no milestone option. If I manually mark a timeline value as a milestone through the website, then I update the date using the API it remove the milestone flag.

https://api.developer.monday.com/docs/timeline

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @cotani

Welcome to the community, a great way to get answers and ideas. Have you tried to set the value in the API to:

"{\"to\":\"2020-10-14\",\"from\":\"2020-10-14\",\"visualization_type\":\"milestone\"}"

posts.author: cotani (Chris)
posts.cookedHtml:
basdebruin:

milestone

That did the trick. Thanks for the quick reply!

It would be great if that was added to the documentation.

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml: There are indeed bits and pieces missing in the doc. What I do in these cases is to setup the column in the UI as required (in this case with a milestone timeline) and query the column in the API playground.

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
